name: Pasta with Spicy Pea Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Preparation: crush the garlic clove and chop the onion.
1. Place the peas in a large pan. Cover with cold water.
Bring to the boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 25 minutes, uncovered.
Drain.
2. Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add crushed garlic and cook for 2 minutes.
3. Add spices (chilli powder, turmeric, ground coriander, and ground allspice) and stir for 2 minutes.
4. Add the drained peas, lemon juice, and lemon rind. Stir to combine and simmer for 8-10 minutes.
5. Cook pasta in a large pot of boiling water until al dente. Drain well and transfer to serving plate.
6. Pour sauce over pasta and garnish with coriander leaves.
Serve immediately.
